env_estimated.name: estimated
env_estimated.convention: radiance coeffs; shading E(n)/pi = sum (A_l/pi) L Y

notes: Single-observation intrinsic split: low-frequency, normal-correlated luminance attributed to illumination; the rest retained as albedo. Relighting under the returned env reproduces the captured colour exactly.
Illumination estimate is achromatic (grayscale SH-L2). Coloured-light and multi-view inverse rendering are future work.
